title: Watch: Mount Etna eruption creates trail of bright orange lava
description: A stream of thick orange lava was seen trailing from Europe's biggest active volcano, Mount Etna in Italy, snaking through the mountain.
content:
Dazzling orange lava snakes across Europe's largest active volcano, as shown in striking new footage.
Last Friday's eruption at Mount Etna, located on the Italian island of Sicily, created a thick s… [+250 chars]
de: Beobachten Sie: Der Ausbruch des Ätna hinterlässt eine Spur leuchtend orangefarbener Lava. Man sah einen Strom dicker orangefarbener Lava, der sich vom größten aktiven Vulkan Europas, dem Ätna in Italien, durch den Berg schlängelte.
en: Watch: Mount Etna eruption creates trail of bright orange lava. A stream of thick orange lava was seen trailing from Europe's biggest active volcano, Mount Etna in Italy, snaking through the mountain.
la: Vide: Mons Etna eruptio trahentium lavae aurantiacae clara gignit. Fluvius aquae crassae aurantiacae lavae trahens visus est maximum activum vulcanum Europaeum, montem Aetna in Italia, per montem prehendentem.
